## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX with candidate Nathalie Schrans.](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves technical project management, AI workflow optimization, quality control, and client communication](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Nathalie has extensive content marketing experience, especially in B2B SaaS, and is comfortable with AI-assisted workflows](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [GrowthX uses a proprietary internal platform for content generation, emphasizing human-in-the-loop processes](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Success metrics focus on managing multiple clients efficiently while improving platform functionality](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Responsibilities

  - [Technical Managing Editor acts as project management layer between account directors and content managers](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=110.0)
  - [Ensures content meets style, brand guidelines, and SEO requirements](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Coordinates with clients on deliverables and project status](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Identifies workflow issues and communicates with engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Serves as second line of quality control after content managers](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)

### Candidate Background and Experience

  - [6 years in content marketing, primarily B2B SaaS](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Strong experience in various content types (blogs, case studies, social media, thought leadership)](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Comfortable interviewing SMEs and building client relationships](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Extensive experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) for research and content production](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Developed step-by-step AI workflows for SEO-focused content creation](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)

### AI and Content Production at GrowthX

  - [Internal platform leverages AI at multiple checkpoints in the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Combines various AI models (e.g., Claude, ChatGPT) for different stages of content creation](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Platform evolved from initial AirOps workflows to a proprietary codebase](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Emphasis on refining inputs and prompts to improve AI-generated output quality](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)

### Client Management and Prioritization

  - [Balances multiple clients with varying needs and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Builds trust through early involvement, maintaining quality, and fostering collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [Aims for a "best hire mindset" to become an integral part of the client's team](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

### Performance Metrics and Reporting

  - [Success measured by number of clients managed and content output volume](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Emphasis on efficiently using the internal platform to improve workflows](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=1282.0)
  - [Analytics currently handled separately, with plans to integrate into the platform](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)
  - [Technical Managing Editors expected to stay informed on performance metrics](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

### Future Vision for GrowthX

  - [Exploring "Generative Engine Optimization" (GEO) for AI search visibility](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [Collaborating with Scrunch for prompt tracking and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Plans to offer the internal platform as a potential SaaS product](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [Maintaining focus on services, recognizing ongoing value of human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/-jbyHTmyjQ5qRLrovu9Dax4XGAUc-Ckh?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)

## Next Steps

  - Candidate to consider role alignment with career goals, particularly in strategy and client relationship management
  - GrowthX to evaluate Nathalie's fit based on her content marketing experience and AI workflow proficiency
  - Potential follow-up on any remaining questions or next steps in the hiring process
